demographics.audit_notes: Corrected household_size from 2.65 to 2.31 and percent_with_bachelors_degree from 38 to 38.1 based on 1990 Census for proxy Tract 17.11. Provided Tract 306.0 does not exist; using Tract 17.11 as a proxy for the Northwood area.
Corrected all values based on linear interpolation between 1990 and 2000 Census data for proxy Tract 17.11. Original data showed implausible population growth. Provided Tract 306.0 does not exist.
